title: Taxi Zagreb to Čiovo | Fixed €514 Transfer | TAXI Antonio
description: Private taxi and transfer from Zagreb to Čiovo. Fixed €514 per car, up to 4 passengers, door to door. Book direct with Antonio.
keywords: taxi zagreb to čiovo, transfer zagreb to čiovo, zagreb to čiovo taxi, zagreb to čiovo transfer

schema.name: Taxi Zagreb to Čiovo
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi and transfer from Zagreb to Čiovo, 514 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, door to door.

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Zagreb to Čiovo, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 1028 euros.

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi from Zagreb to Čiovo?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 514 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, with tolls, fuel and luggage included. A return trip is 1028.

mainEntity.name: Is the transfer private or shared?

acceptedAnswer.text: Every transfer is private and door to door, in a Škoda Superb. No vehicle sharing and no extra stops unless you ask for them.

mainEntity.name: Can you stop along the way?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. On the longer routes I am happy to stop for a coffee, a photo or a quick sight. Just let me know when booking.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can confirm the car and your pickup time. For a sooner ride, call or WhatsApp me directly.
